stages.precondition: box_1 is accessible for dual-arm grasping, and both end_effector_left and end_effector_right are grasping nothing.
stages.postcondition: box_1 is grasped with end_effector_left and end_effector_right.

pre_validation.reason: The left end effector is in contact with and appears to be grasping the red box (box_1), so both end effectors are not grasping nothing.

stages.precondition: The red_box is accessible for a dual-arm grasp, and both end_effector_left and end_effector_right are grasping nothing.
stages.postcondition: The red_box is grasped with both end_effector_left and end_effector_right.

pre_validation.reason: The left end effector is in contact with the red_box (not grasping nothing), so the condition that both end effectors grasp nothing is not satisfied.

stages.precondition: box_1 is accessible and both end_effector_left and end_effector_right are grasping nothing.
stages.postcondition: box_1 is grasped with dual-arm symmetric contact (left & right).

pre_validation.reason: box_1 (red) is directly in contact with the left end effector, so the left end effector is not clearly grasping nothing and box_1 is not clearly accessible.

stages.precondition: The red_box is accessible to both end_effector_left and end_effector_right, and both end effectors are grasping nothing.
stages.postcondition: The red_box is grasped with dual-arm symmetric contact (left & right).

pre_validation.reason: The red_box is on the table between the two end effectors and appears reachable from both sides, and both grippers are open and not holding any object.

post_validation.reason: The red_box is held between both robot arms, with the left and right end-effectors contacting opposite sides in a symmetric dual-arm grasp.

stages.precondition: The red_box is held by the robot, and the table area right of the green_box is available for placement.
stages.postcondition: The red_box is placed on the table right of the green_box.

pre_validation.reason: The robot’s grippers are holding the red_box, and the tabletop area to the right of the green_box appears clear for placement.

post_validation.reason: Both boxes are on the table, and the red_box is positioned to the right of the green_box.

stages.precondition: The green_box is accessible to both end_effector_left and end_effector_right, and both end effectors are grasping nothing.
stages.postcondition: The green_box is grasped with dual-arm symmetric contact (left & right).

pre_validation.reason: The green_box is unobstructed and within reach of both visible end effectors, and neither end effector is holding any object.

post_validation.reason: Both left and right end-effectors are in contact with opposite sides of the green_box in a symmetric dual-arm grasp.
